site.name: Kol Or Ensemble
site.tagline: The Sound of Light that Illuminates the World
site.heroText: We are freshmen from Needham High School performing in places to spread the beauty of music and help people know how it can touch hearts.
site.aboutTitle: Music shaped to carry clarity, warmth, and hope.
site.aboutText: Kol Or Ensemble takes its name from the Hebrew words Kol, meaning sound, and Or, meaning light. Inspired by the idea that music can illuminate hearts and connect the world, the ensemble seeks to bring clarity, warmth, and hope through chamber music. Each performance is an invitation to listen deeply and to experience sound as light.

members.name: Daniel Choi
members.description: Violist and member of Needham High School's chamber orchestra. Qualified for MMEA Senior Districts.

members.name: Jonah Black
members.description: Cellist for Needham High School's chamber orchestra. Qualified for MMEA Junior Districts.

members.name: Zirui Wang
members.description: Violinist in Needham High School's Strings Orchestra.

members.name: Peter Shin
members.description: Cellist and member of Needham High School's Strings Orchestra.

concerts.description:
With Gratitude: Kol Or's May Concert at Wingate, Needham
In this beautiful month of May, we dedicate this concert to our parents and families. Thank you for your endless love, support, and encouragement. Tonight's music is our small gift of appreciation.
pieces:
1) Humoresque, by Antonin Dvorak
2) Moon River by Henry Mancini: Solo by Zirui Wang
3) Shipping Up to Boston by the Dropkick Murphys
4) Romanze by Max Bruck: Solo by Daniel Choi
5) Lullaby by Brahms
6) What a wonderful world by Louis Armstrong: Duet by Jonah and Peter
7) You Raise me Up by Josh Groban
8) Bach's 1st Cello Suite: Solo by Jonah

videos.title: Shipping Up to Boston
videos.description: Kol Or plays Shipping Up to Boston by the Dropkick Murphys, arranged for a strings orchestra.

videos.title: You Raise Me Up
videos.description: For the concert finale, Kol Or plays You Raise Me Up by Josh Groban.
